top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 126, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
13,000ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
103ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo's brutal paved mountain loops through Alabama's forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 126 miles.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 126 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 13,000ft of climbing on brutal paved mountain loops through Alabama's does to your power file on race day.
At Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
126 miles rewards fat oxidation. This volume work shifts your fuel mix so you're still burning fat at hour 5, not bonking at hour 3.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on brutal paved mountain loops through Alabama's. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 126 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo’s 126 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Cheaha Challenge Gran Fondo. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, VO2max, and Race Simulation to prepare you for 126 miles of brutal paved mountain loops through alabama's high country in Jacksonville, Alabama, USA.
